ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "building_size" TEXT /* Size of the building */,
  "lot_size" TEXT /* Size of the lot */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., available, leased, sold) */,
  "rental_rate" TEXT /* Rental rate of the property */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property manager */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last property inspection */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for property listings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the property was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES property_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the property type was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the property type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude for geolocation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude for geolocation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the location was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company (if applicable) */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the client was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the client was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leases" (
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being leased */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client leasing the property */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease */,
  "rent" REAL /* Monthly rent of the lease */,
  "lease_type" TEXT /* Type of lease (e.g., commercial, residential) */,
  "security_deposit" REAL /* Security deposit amount */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the lease is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the lease was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the lease was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, credit card) */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment is paid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES leases ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the property manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the property manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the property manager */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the property manager (e.g., Senior Manager, Assistant Manager) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the manager is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the manager was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the manager was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leased_properties" (
  "leased_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leased property */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being leased */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client leasing the property */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is currently leased */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the leased property was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the leased property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leased_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leased_properties_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leased_properties_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "available_properties" (
  "available_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each available property */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property available for lease */,
  "rental_rate" REAL /* Rental rate of the property */,
  "available_date" TEXT /* Date the property became available */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is currently available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the available property was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the available property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("available_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_available_properties_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance request */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property requiring maintenance */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance required */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance request (e.g., open, in progress, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name of the person or team assigned to the request */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the maintenance */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the maintenance */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the maintenance is completed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the request was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the vendor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service provided (e.g., plumbing, electrical) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vendor is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vendor was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the vendor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor providing the service */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the invoice is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments_to_vendors" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, bank transfer) */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment is paid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_to_vendors_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., interior, exterior) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
